title: avena pubescens var. lucida
intro: Avena pubescens var. lucida, also known as lucid oatgrass or shiny oatgrass, is a perennial grass species belonging to the Poaceae family and is native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. This plant is used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to calm the nervous system and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Avena pubescens var. lucida include its potential to soothe digestive issues, alleviate stress and anxiety, and promote restful sleep. Avena pubescens var. lucida can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal blends to enhance its medicinal properties.
